name: ARRANGED MARRIAGE | Lee Chaeryeong
description:
+Arranged marriage+ G!P

(Chaeryeong, the woman that you are...oh my days..)

The story is about your arranged marriage with a total stranger who turns out to be a celebrity.

Of course the start of your marriage is a rough patch since the both of you think arranged marriage is messed up but it's what both of your parents want, so you must go through with it.
creator: StanItzy
